# Cease Communication Letter - Cease and Desist Debt Collectors [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Stop debt collection calls with a cease and desist letter. Free template, FDCPA rights, and what happens after you send it. 2026 guide.

## About
ceaseanddesistdebt.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Cease Communication Letter for Debt Collectors - Free Template: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/cease-communication-letter.html
- When Debt Collectors Violate the Law: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/collector-violations.html
- Stopping Electronic Debt Collection - Texts, Emails, and Social Media: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/electronic-communications.html
- Your Rights Under the FDCPA - Fair Debt Collection Practices Act: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/fdcpa-rights.html
- Cease Communication Letter - Cease and Desist Debt Collectors: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/
- Free Cease and Desist Letter Template for Debt Collectors: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/sample-letter.html
- Debt Collectors Contacting Your Family, Friends, and Neighbors: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/third-party-contact.html
- Debt Verification and Validation - Your Right to Demand Proof: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/verification-rights.html
- What Happens After You Send a Cease and Desist Letter: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/what-happens-after-sending.html
- When Debt Collectors Violate the Law - Your Remedies: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/when-collectors-violate.html
- Which Debts Can You Send a Cease and Desist For?: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/which-debts.html
- Debt Collectors Calling Your Workplace - Your Rights and How to Stop It: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/workplace-calls.html
- Privacy Policy: https://ceaseanddesistdebt.com/privacy.html

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
